name: daily monitor exits cleanly when given a SIGTERM-like termination signal between iterations
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus fixtures && printf '{"gate":"pass"}\n' > pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && printf 'sources: []\n' > fixtures/sources.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/monitor.sh" --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --once --sources fixtures/sources.yaml --simulate-shutdown 2>out.txt && grep -q 'shutdown=clean' out.txt && grep -q 'exit=0' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
